task_completion.description: Verify the agent is logged in as the admin user.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the username 'admin' or 'Mitchell Admin' in the top right corner of the Odoo interface, or evidence of successfully logging in with the 'admin' credentials.

task_completion.description: Verify the user preferences or profile settings page is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a modal or page titled 'Preferences', 'My Profile', or similar, displaying user-specific settings.

task_completion.description: Verify the Timezone is set to 'America/Chicago'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a dropdown or input field labeled 'Timezone' with the value 'America/Chicago' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the Notification preference is set to 'Handle by Emails'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a radio button or dropdown field labeled 'Notification', 'Notification Management', or similar, with the option 'Handle by Emails' selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the preferences have been saved.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the 'Save' button being clicked, the preferences modal being closed after changes, or a visual indicator that changes were successfully saved.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web interface to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo UI, not terminal commands, Python scripts, or API calls executing database updates.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show genuine Odoo interface elements and menus, not a text editor or a static mockup.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use browser developer tools to fake the visual state.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no browser developer tools (Inspect Element) open and modifying the DOM to display the target values.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target timezone must be exactly 'America/Chicago'. The target notification preference must be 'Handle by Emails' in the UI (which corresponds to the 'email' value in the backend). The admin user login is 'admin'.
